heading: Assignment of payments
label: 7995 Assignment of payments
text: The provisions of , relating to assignment of payments, shall apply to payments made under the authority of this Act. The producer making the assignment, or the assignee, shall provide the Secretary with notice, in such manner as the Secretary may require, of any assignment made under this section.section 590h(g) of title 16
notes: References in TextThis Act, referred to in text, is , , , known as the Farm Security and Rural Investment Act of 2002. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 107–171116 Stat. 134section 7901 of this titleMay 13, 2002
